text: I did not experience any treatment benefits from Topamax for my severe and incapacitating migraines. I did not get relief for my migraine headaches. My migraine headaches did not stop. My migraine headaches did not decrease in duration(3 days per migraine) or intensity (severe). I had one - 3 day a week migraine for over seven years. The Topamax treatment side effects were extreme when I was taking it. I experienced extreme weight loss, I went from one hundred thirty pounds down to ninety eight pounds. I experienced mental confusion and had a hard time focusing on anything including family, relationships and work. I experienced a deep depression and had suicidal ideations that I had never before had. I also experienced loss of my word finding skills. The treatment details for Topamax which is used to treat seizure disorders was also supposed to treat migraines are as follows. As the patient I was to take fifty milligrams per day and was told I would lose perhaps two percent of my body weight but that after a thirty day period my migraines would decrease in intensity and decrease in duration.
